description: Per-card CardCmd.AutoPlay semantics for the deck simulator. Each entry says which pile the trigger card auto-plays cards from, the card-type filter, how many are auto-played (resolved count, with a separate upgraded count), the selection mode, and whether the SAME chosen card is replayed N times (repeatSameCard) versus N distinct cards. AutoPlay value accrues to the auto-played cards / deck EV, not to the trigger card, so every auto-play card is valued via play-delta. sourcePile: Draw|Hand|Discard. cardTypeFilter: Attack|Skill|Power|Any. selection: chosen (pick best) | randomFiltered | randomPlayable.

cards.note: Auto-play Cards random Attacks from the discard pile (StableShuffle.Take(Cards)). Upgrade: Cards 3->4.
Loop Cards times: auto-play a random playable card from the draw pile (fallback any). Upgrade: Cards 2->3.
After drawing Cards, choose one playable hand Skill and auto-play THAT card Repeat times. Repeat is fixed at 3 (unchanged on upgrade; upgrade only raises the separate draw Cards 3->5).
